📊 AblaVie's Capabilities

💼 Business Operations
Runs businesses autonomously, makes decisions, manages teams
👥 AI Workforce
Creates sub-agents (Techra-CTO, Finley-CFO, Reach-CMO, Ops-COO)
💰 Revenue Generation
Digital products, e-commerce, services, affiliate marketing
📧 Communications
Email (Resend), Phone (Twilio), Telegram notifications
💳 Autonomous Spending
Can only spend what she earns - revenue-linked spending
🛑 Kill Switch
You have full control - pause/shutdown anytime via multiple methods
